records.v: One big granuloma found in coelomic cavity. Partially removed. Needs to be removed the remaining part after one month. Broken tail feather.
Enlarged spleen, Worm found in coelomic cavity; removed.Coelomytis
Old pneumonic changes seen on lungs
Casque all demaged parts removed and it right leg wound on tarsometarsal joint, bandage applied anthracosis
Foam liver enlarge in Sepia Caramel area
Left wings ankylosis, missing secondary feathers in both wings
Fibrin(yellowish material) deposits on the intestine .
